customers_anonymized_chk.name: customers_anonymized_chk
customers_anonymized_chk.value: "customers"."anonymized_at" is null or ("customers"."email" like 'anonymized-%@deleted.local' and "customers"."name" is null and "customers"."phone" is null)

refresh_tokens_subject_xor_chk.name: refresh_tokens_subject_xor_chk
refresh_tokens_subject_xor_chk.value: ("refresh_tokens"."user_id" is not null) <> ("refresh_tokens"."customer_id" is not null)

carts_one_active_per_customer.name: carts_one_active_per_customer
carts_one_active_per_customer.where: status = 'active' AND customer_id IS NOT NULL
